name: Waterfall.io
description: A SaaS platform that connects analytics and search data (Google Analytics, Search Console, Ads, Bing, Shopify, HubSpot) to build dashboards and insights.

auth_methods.note: User-facing integrations use OAuth for connecting third-party sources. No public API authentication docs or API reference discovered on official docs; therefore 'none_public' indicates no public developer API found.

credential_access.note: Pricing page shows Free/Pro/Business tiers; no documentation on obtaining API credentials or whether API access is available on plans. Contact/sales page suggests enterprise contact for custom solutions.

api_surface.note: No public REST/GraphQL API docs or SDKs found on official domains; only user integration articles. 'narrow' used because only connectors are documented (OAuth integrations), not a public API surface.

buildability.note: Cannot build an AI-agent integration today because there is no public developer API documentation or a documented way to self-serve API credentials. Recommend contacting Waterfall sales via https://waterfall.io/contact/ to inquire about partner/enterprise API access.

queries: Waterfall.io API documentation Waterfall API developer docs waterfall.io "API" "developer" "authentication"
Waterfall API site:waterfall.io OR site:help.waterfall.io "API" "developer" "authentication" "API key"
